summary:
Comprehensive implementation plan for building an automated local AI agent platform that orchestrates the full passive income pipeline: niche research → image generation via ComfyUI API → post-processing → PDF assembly → listing copy generation via Ollama → ready-to-publish output packages.

Covers:
- System architecture (orchestrator + specialized model stack)
- Model selection: SDXL + ColoringBook.Redmond LoRA for coloring, Flux for wall art, Qwen 2.5 14B for writing
- LoRA fine-tuning feasibility on RTX 5070 12GB
- ComfyUI REST API integration
- Ollama API integration
- Agent handoff protocol and knowledge base design
- Diagnostic/logging/troubleshooting infrastructure
- Skills files and system prompts for smaller agent maintenance
- Phase-by-phase execution plan
